summary: Read and normalize a tenant-supplied UniteLabs OpenAPI document for source-pack review.
agent_notes: Boundary-gated source sampling only. The repo grounding command reads an OpenAPI document and must not create a workflow run, poll a live run, send lab commands, or call a device endpoint.

summary: Poll a workflow run status by run id.
agent_notes: Read-only run inspection candidate. This pack records response shapes only and must not trigger or resume a live run.

summary: Read structured execution logs for a workflow run, optionally filtered by phase.
agent_notes: Read-only log inspection candidate. Logs can include workflow, phase, step, and action events.

summary: Read structured artifacts produced by a workflow run.
agent_notes: Read-only artifact inspection candidate. Artifacts are result data linked to the run, workflow version, phase, step, and inputs.
